message:
fix: optimize N+1 queries and improve cleanup tracking

- Refactor getModelComparisonReport() and getFleetAnalytics() to use
  batch queries instead of per-agent queries (O(N) → O(2) queries)
- Track restart timeouts in supervisor.service.ts to prevent daemons
  from restarting after stopDaemon() is called
- Fix useEffect dependency loop in useDashboard.ts that could cause
  excessive API calls when dashboard loaded
- Minor fix to safety.service.ts cleanup job formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
